creator: 1186834339@qq.com
text:
I want to use pkgng,but I cannot update pkgng.
1.Installing pkgng:(as root)
#cd /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg
#make install clean
2.#pkg2ng
3.Edit pkg.conf:
#cd /usr/local/etc/
(only "pkg.conf.sample")
#cp pkg.conf.sample pkg.conf
#ee pkg.conf
(Only change PACKAGESITE)
(PACKAGESITE : ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pkgng/data/freebsd-9-i386/2012-06-05/)
#pkg update
(download repo.txz--->OK.But repo.txz cannot be used.)

BUG:pkgng cannot be updated.

How-To-Repeat: I do not know.
